column1: # code_mate release partitions (stage 10): single factory app + FAT storage (read-only U-disk).
# Drop dual-OTA + spiffs. Firmware is only ~1.63MB (compressed font)
# 16MB flash: nvs (mode flag) + factory 3MB + storage FAT 8MB (holds 842KB installer
# ASCII only -- PlatformIO parses this CSV with the system codepage (GBK on zh-CN Windows).
